name: PAX Four
summary: A discreet, pocket-sized dry-herb vaporiser for patients who want flavour and portability in one slim device.
description: The PAX Four is a compact hybrid portable vaporiser with real-time temperature control and four preset heat modes from 190°C to 220°C, tuned for consistent vapour from a 0.3g oven. Haptic feedback, a single-button interface and motion controls keep operation simple, and the slim 125g chassis slips into a pocket discreetly. It suits patients who prioritise discretion and ease of use over long battery runtime. Battery life is around 50 minutes per charge, so frequent all-day medicators may need to top up; preset-only temperatures also mean less fine control than some rivals.
